retrieved_result: Amazon starts UK fresh food delivery Amazon is stepping up its battle against British supermarkets with the launch of fresh food deliveries on Thursday. Amazon Fresh food deliveries 'to start this month in UK'Read more The online specialist’s Amazon Fresh service will offer more than 130,000 groceries to homes in north and east London,
